mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.created_at, '%Y-%m') AS name, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM eb_customer t WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL AND t.created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.created_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY name DESC LIMIT 24
SELECT IFNULL(t.contract_category, '') AS name, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM eb_contract t WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY t.contract_category ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT CAST(t.uid AS CHAR) AS name, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM eb_customer t WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL AND t.uid IS NOT NULL AND t.uid > 0 GROUP BY t.uid ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.date, '%Y-%m') AS name, CAST(IFNULL(SUM(t.num), 0) AS SIGNED) AS cnt FROM eb_client_bill t WHERE t.bill_types = 1 AND t.date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY name DESC LIMIT 24
mapper.sql: FROM eb_client_bill b INNER JOIN eb_contract c ON b.cid = c.id AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
FROM eb_client_bill b INNER JOIN eb_contract c ON b.cid = c.id AND c.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN eb_admin a ON CAST(b.uid AS UNSIGNED) = a.id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT b.uid AS uid, COALESCE(MAX(a.name), '') AS name, CAST(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN b.types IN (0, 1) THEN b.num ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS price, CAST(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN b.types = 2 THEN b.num ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS expend
AND b.types IN (0, 1, 2) GROUP BY b.uid ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT b.uid
AND b.types IN (0, 1, 2) GROUP BY b.uid ) x

SELECT c.contract_category AS contractCategory, CAST(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN b.types IN (0, 1) THEN b.num ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS price, CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.types = 0 THEN c.id END) AS SIGNED) AS contractCount, CAST(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN b.types = 2 THEN b.num ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS expend
AND b.types IN (0, 1, 2) GROUP BY c.contract_category HAVING CAST(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN b.types IN (0, 1) THEN b.num ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) >= 0.01 ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT t.id FROM eb_contract t WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL
AND t.contract_category IN #{cat}
